---
description: "The file describes the standard must be followed when a grid is required in an Angular application. It covers grid configuration, column definitions, and data binding."
name: "Angular Grid Standard"
---

### Styles
- Use an angular grid component.
- Width must be 800px and height must be 600px.
- The header must have a background color of #1D598E.
- Font color of the header must be white.
- The grid must have a border of 1px solid #1D598E.
- The minimium width of each column must be 100px.

### Formatting
- If the column is a date, it must be formatted as MM/DD/YYYY.

### Data Binding
- The column must display a tooltip with the full value of the cell when the value is truncated.
